description:
Deploy an Etherpad-Lite instance using the 'etherpad/etherpad' Docker image named 'etherpad' on port 9001 and integrate it with Jitsi Meet using the base URL 'http://localhost:9001/p/'. In the Jitsi meeting room 'WeeklyStandup', record the following agenda in the shared notes:

Weekly Standup Agenda - Engineering Team
1. Previous action items review
2. Sprint progress update
3. Blockers and dependencies
4. New action items

Save a screenshot showing the open shared notes panel within the meeting to /home/ga/etherpad_integration_proof.png.
